# History

Keep track of your past AI generations and interactions in a unified chat-like interface.

## Overview
The **History** page automatically saves your prompts and the AI's results from various tools. It acts as a persistent log so you never lose a good test case or report.

## How to Use

### 1. Review Past Work
- Scroll through the chronological list of entries.
- **Prompt vs Result**: User inputs are shown on the right (blue avatar), and AI results are on the left (bot avatar).

### 2. Specialized Result Views
- **Test Cases**: Displayed in an interactive table. Click "Show All" to expand long lists.
- **Reviews**: Shows the review summary and includes an expandable "Improved Version" table.
- **Bug Reports**: Formatted with clear headers for Summary, Description, and Severity.

### 3. Management
- **Delete Entry**: Click the Trash icon on a specific bubble to remove it from your history.
- **Clear All**: Use the "Clear All" button at the top right to wipe your entire history.
- **Expand/Collapse**: Long messages are truncated for better readability; use "Show More" to see the full content.

## Important Note
History is stored **locally** in your browser. Clearing your browser cache or switching devices will result in the loss of this history unless you have manually exported your results elsewhere.
